sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_strings (id INT, str1 VARCHAR(100), str2 VARCHAR(100));
INSERT INTO test_strings (id, str1, str2) VALUES (1, 'MonetDB', 'MonetDB');
INSERT INTO test_strings (id, str1, str2) VALUES (2, 'MonetDB', 'MonetD3');
SELECT id, levenshtein(str1, str2) AS distance FROM test_strings;
UPDATE test_strings SET str2 = 'CashDB' WHERE id = 2;
